name: rhf-compiler-compat
description: Test react-hook-form API compatibility with React Compiler

scripts.test:regressions: bun test holes.test.tsx && bun test --preload ./compiler-plugin.ts holes.test.tsx
scripts.test:forced-memo: bun test forced.test.tsx && bun test --preload ./compiler-plugin.ts forced.test.tsx
scripts.inspect: bun inspect-compile.mjs && bun inspect-output.mjs && bun inspect-destructure.mjs
